promotions.headline: SammyC's Skool is Live
promotions.short_detail: Research modules, vendor intel & direct access to Sam.
promotions.full_detail: SammyC's Skool community is now live. Get direct access to Sam, research peptide modules, vendor intel, and community discussion.
promotions.strip_offer: Research modules, vendor codes and giveaways

promotions.headline: 40% off sitewide, stacks with SAMMYC
promotions.short_detail: Birthday sale, code SAMMYC adds 15%, free 10ml BAC water on orders $100+
promotions.full_detail: Glow Aminos is celebrating their company birthday with 40% off sitewide, stackable with the 15% SAMMYC code. Every qualifying order of $100 or more automatically receives a free 10ml BAC water while supplies last. Confirm final eligibility, stacking rules, and checkout pricing directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: 40% off sitewide, stacks with SAMMYC
promotions.short_detail: Birthday sale, code SAMMYC adds 15%, free 10ml BAC water on orders $100+
promotions.full_detail: Flawless Compounds is celebrating their company birthday with 40% off sitewide, stackable with the 15% SAMMYC code. Every qualifying order of $100 or more automatically receives a free 10ml BAC water while supplies last. Every new batch is 7X tested, including endotoxins, heavy metals, and sterility. Confirm final eligibility, stacking rules, and checkout pricing directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: Mix and Match sale, bulk pricing up to 25% off
promotions.short_detail: Auto bulk pricing up to 25% off, stacks with SAMMYC and the 5% Zelle discount
promotions.full_detail: Oneday Compounds is running a Mix and Match sale with bulk pricing applied automatically at checkout on any combination of research materials. Volume tiers are 10% off at 3 or more units, 15% off at 6 or more units, and 25% off at 10 or more units. No code is needed for the bulk pricing and it stacks with existing discount codes and the 5% Zelle payment discount. Research Rewards run alongside the sale, where qualifying spend after discounts unlocks complimentary research material that appears automatically in cart. Spend $300 unlocks 1 free vial, $600 unlocks 2, and $900 unlocks 3. Sale runs through Monday. Confirm final eligibility, stacking rules, and checkout pricing directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: 10% off sitewide, SAMMYC boosted to 25%
promotions.short_detail: 10% off sitewide, plus the SAMMYC code boosted to 25% off
promotions.full_detail: LabSourced Peptides is running 10% off sitewide, with the SAMMYC code boosted to 25% off. Confirm final eligibility, stacking rules, and checkout pricing directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: 30% off sitewide, stacks with SAMMYC
promotions.short_detail: Code SAMMYC adds another 15% off on top
promotions.full_detail: Southern Aminos is running 30% off sitewide, stackable with the 15% SAMMYC discount. Confirm the final discount and checkout terms directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: SAMMYC boosted to 35% off
promotions.short_detail: Code SAMMYC is boosted to 35% off for a limited time
promotions.full_detail: Mile High Compounds has boosted the SAMMYC code to 35% off through Monday July 20, 2026 at 12:00am ET. Confirm final eligibility and checkout pricing directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: Weekend sale, two days only
promotions.short_detail: 20% off seven capsules and Buy 2 Get 1 Free on five peptides, Sun Jul 19 and Mon Jul 20.
promotions.full_detail: Disguised Alpha is running a two day weekend sale covering 20% off seven capsule products and Buy 2 Get 1 Free on five peptides. The sale runs Sunday July 19 and Monday July 20 and ends at 11:59pm Eastern. Offer scope and stacking rules are set by the vendor, confirm eligibility at checkout.

promotions.headline: New partner: Disguised Alpha
promotions.full_detail: Disguised Alpha is now a tracked vendor on mypeptideprice.com. Code SAMMYC applies 10% off sitewide.
promotions.intro_body: Disguised Alpha is now tracked on mypeptideprice.com, so their pricing appears alongside every other vendor in the comparison tables. Code SAMMYC takes 10% off sitewide.

promotions.headline: Buy 3 Get 1 Free, mix and match
promotions.short_detail: Buy any 3 products and the 4th is free, mix and match across the store. Applied automatically at checkout, no code needed. Code SAMMYC still applies on top for its standing 15% off.
promotions.full_detail: Instant Peptides is running a Buy 3 Get 1 Free mix and match promotion from Monday July 21 through Sunday July 26, ending 11:59pm Eastern. Any 3 products qualify, they do not need to match, and the free item is applied automatically in the cart with no code required. Code SAMMYC still applies on top for its standing 15% off, which is the same rate it gives outside the sale. Every order placed during the sale is entered into the vendor Build-A-Kit giveaway, with 3 winners selected at random by Instant Peptides. Giveaway terms, eligibility and winner selection are handled entirely by the vendor.

promotions.headline: 15% off sitewide, two days only
promotions.short_detail: 15% off sitewide, stackable with code SAMMYC. New customers can also stack NEWCOFFEE20 for an extra 20% off.
promotions.full_detail: Coffee & Peppers is running a two day sitewide sale on Saturday July 25 and Sunday July 26. The 15% sitewide discount stacks with code SAMMYC. First time customers can additionally stack code NEWCOFFEE20 for 20% off. Stacking rules and eligibility are set by the vendor, confirm at checkout.
